sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17820" key="au)tomh/twr" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐτο-μήτωρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ορος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n17820.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">very mother herself,</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">her mother's very child,</tr_> dub. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0260.tlg001:7:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Semon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.12</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
